name: Five-Flavor Pound Cake Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, water, and flavorings in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Pour half of the hot glaze over the pound cake while it is still in the pan. Keep the remaining glaze warm.
4. Allow the first half of the glaze to be absorbed by the cake.
5. Carefully remove the cake from the pan and pour the remaining glaze slowly over the top, spreading evenly.
